title: IIT Guwahati Personality Development Trainer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
organization: Indian Institute of Technology Guwahati (IIT Guwahati)
short_info: Indian Institute of Technology Guwahati (IIT Guwahati) Personality Development Trainer Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of IIT Guwahati. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIT Guwahati Personality Development Trainer Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: MBA/MHRM or equivalent from a recognized university with at least 60% marks
qualification.details: Personality Development Trainer : MBA/MHRM or equivalent from a recognized university with at least 60% marks. Minimum 2 years of experience in conducting personality training programs and interview preparation activities.

selection_process: Online Application Shortlisting based on qualification
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT Guwahati Personality Development Trainer Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 12-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Guwahati to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Guwahati PDT recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form for the Personality Development Trainer (PDT) position at IIT Guwahati is 12th June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the PDT post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an MBA/MHRM or equivalent degree from a recognized university with at least 60% marks to be eligible for the PDT role.

faq.question: Q3. How many years of experience are needed for the Personality Development Trainer position?
faq.answer: A minimum of 2 years of experience in conducting personality training programs and interview preparation activities is required for this post.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Personality Development Trainer (PDT) post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for applicants is 40 years as of the application deadline.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the PDT role at IIT Guwahati?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated monthly salary of Rs. 50,000/-.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Personality Development Trainer (PDT) position?
faq.answer: The selection process involves online application, shortlisting based on qualifications and experience, and an online interview.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment is for a contractual position.

faq.question: Q9. Where is IIT Guwahati located?
faq.answer: IIT Guwahati is located in Guwahati, Assam, with the pincode 781039.

faq.question: Q10. How can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: You can find the links to the official notification and the online application form in the "Important Links" section of this article.
